title: geum mulleri
intro: Geum mulleri, also known as the alpine avens, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Geum mulleri can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
